data.name: Name
data.url: URL of the local LLM manager server

data_description.url: Full API URL, for example http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/status
data_description.scan_interval: How often the status is checked

start.name: Start LLM
start.description: Starts the configured local LLM process.

stop.name: Stop LLM
stop.description: Stops the running local LLM process.
